prompt: SeraProtocolのサブグラフからTWETH/TUSDCマーケットの板情報（bid/ask各5本）を取得するTypeScriptスクリプトを書いてください。viemは使わずfetchだけで。

assertions.name: correct_subgraph_url
assertions.description: Uses the correct Goldsky subgraph URL: api.goldsky.com/api/public/project_cmicv6kkbhyto01u3agb155hg/subgraphs/sera-pro/1.0.9/gn

assertions.name: bid_ask_separation
assertions.description: Queries bids and asks separately with correct isBid true/false filters

assertions.name: correct_sort_order
assertions.description: Bids sorted desc (highest first), asks sorted asc (lowest first)

assertions.name: rawAmount_filter
assertions.description: Filters out empty levels with rawAmount_gt: 0

assertions.name: no_viem_import
assertions.description: Does NOT import or use viem — uses only fetch

assertions.name: valid_typescript
assertions.description: Output is valid TypeScript that would compile
